# Alice

## Expertise
- Microservices testing strategies
- Testcontainers, database testing
- CI/CD pipeline optimization

## Positions
- Prefers integration tests over mocks: was burned by mock drift where "test suite was all green but production broke because the mock didn't match the actual API"
- Uses testcontainers with Postgres for integration tests
- Tried database-per-file approach but hit connection pool exhaustion at ~200 test files
- Considers end-to-end tests either "too flaky or too slow"

## Resources Shared
- None (asked questions, received resources from others)
